commit_scope: Make the real BMF-grammar.bml body proof scoring explicit and portable across sibling kernels.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-companion-shell-source-proof.fk
local_validation.notes: The body proof returns 37, one point per assertion, because a 37-bit mask overflows sibling kernel integer range. The companion shell/container proof remains 1023.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The real BMF-grammar.bml body proof reports a portable assertion-count score, preserving cross-kernel proof readability without integer overflow.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This strengthens proof readability for the real BMF-grammar.bml body model. Full BML thesis parity remains open: complete semantic lowering, corpus compile, and forward/backward native execution across the companion corpus are still required.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk proves BMF-grammar.bml parses into a BMF class body with constants, fields, constructor, Main, methods, and source body tokens.
The proof score now names assertion-count semantics so sibling kernels do not overflow on a 37-bit mask.
